mathmodels 0.0.9
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with mathmodels
    • 📖 使用手册 (Online Book)
  • News

Package index

Data Preprocessing

Functions for scaling, normalizing, and standardizing indicator data.

standardize() normalize() rescale() rescale_middle() rescale_interval() rescale_extreme() rescale_initial() rescale_mean() to_positive()
Preprocessing Functions for Data Normalization and Standardization

Subjective Weighting

Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP).

AHP()
AHP: Analytic Hierarchy Process

Objective Weighting

Data-driven methods for determining indicator weights.

entropy_weight()
Entropy Weight Method
critic_weight()
CRITIC Weight Method
pca_weight()
PCA-Based Weighting Method
cv_weight()
Coefficient of Variation Weighting

Weight Combination

Methods for combining subjective and objective weights.

combine_weights()
Combine Subjective and Objective Weights

Comprehensive Evaluation

Multi-criteria decision making and evaluation methods.

topsis()
TOPSIS Method for Multi-Criteria Decision Making
linear_sum()
Linear weighted synthesis
fuzzy_eval()
Fuzzy Comprehensive Evaluation
rank_sum_ratio()
Rank Sum Ratio (RSR) Evaluation

Grey Relational Analysis

Grey system theory for relational analysis and TOPSIS.

grey_corr() grey_corr_topsis()
Grey Relational Analysis Functions

Fuzzy Sets & Membership Functions

Fuzzy set membership functions, computation, and defuzzification.

compute_mf_funs() compute_mf()
Compute fuzzy membership vector and return corresponding membership functions.
defuzzify()
Defuzzification Methods for Fuzzy Comprehensive Evaluation
tri_mf() trap_mf() gauss_mf() gbell_mf() gauss2mf() sigmoid_mf() dsigmoid_mf() psigmoid_mf() z_mf() pi_mf() s_mf() plot_mf()
Membership Functions for Fuzzy Logic

Data Envelopment Analysis (DEA)

CCR, BCC, SBM, and Malmquist productivity index.

basic_DEA() super_DEA() basic_SBM() super_SBM() malmquist()
DEA efficiency analysis

Inequality Measures

Gini coefficient, Theil index, and their decompositions.

gini0() gini() theil0() theil() theil0_g() theil_g() theil_g2_cross() theil_g2_nest()
Inequality Indices

Regional Economics

Location Quotient, Herfindahl-Hirschman Index, and Ellison-Glaeser Index.

LQ() HHI() EG()
Regional Economics Functions

Grey Prediction Models

GM(1,1), GM(1,N), DGM(2,1), and Verhulst models.

GM11() GM1N() DGM21() verhulst()
Grey Prediction Models
markov_chain() GM11_markov()
Markov Chain and Grey-Markov Prediction Models

System Evaluation

Coupling coordination degree and obstacle degree models.

coupling_degree() obstacle_degree()
System Evaluation Functions for Coupling and Obstacle Analysis

Datasets

Built-in example datasets for demonstration and testing.

water_quality
Water Quality Dataset

Differential Equations & Epidemic Models

ODE solvers and classic compartmental epidemic models (SIR, SEIR, SEIRS, SIDP, etc.).

model_malthus()
Malthusian (Exponential) Growth Model
model_logistic()
Logistic Population Growth Model
model_lv()
Lotka-Volterra Predator-Prey Model
model_si()
SI Epidemic Model
model_sir()
SIR Epidemic Model
model_sis()
SIS Epidemic Model
model_seir()
SEIR Epidemic Model
ode_solver()
General ODE Solver

Epidemic Visualization & Metrics

Visualize compartments, incidence, Rt; compute epidemic summary metrics.

epi_metrics()
Extract key epidemic metrics
plot_compartments()
Plot compartment trajectories
plot_incidence()
Plot daily new infections (dI)
plot_phase_si()
Phase plot S vs I
plot_Rt_estimate()
Plot effective reproduction number R_t

Time Series Models

Stationarity tests, decomposition, exponential smoothing, SARIMA, and GARCH.

ts_test()
Stationarity Tests for a Time Series
ts_transform()
Transform a Time Series for Stationarity
ts_back_transform()
Back-Transform Forecasts to the Original Scale
ts_stl()
STL (Seasonal + Trend + Loess) Decomposition
ts_ets()
ETS (Error, Trend, Seasonality) Exponential Smoothing
ts_sarima()
SARIMA Model Fitting
ts_garch()
GARCH Variance Modeling
ts_sarima_garch()
Two-Stage SARIMA-GARCH Joint Model
ts_forecast()
Generate Forecasts from a Fitted Time Series Model

Time Series Plots

Plotting functions for stationarity, decomposition, forecasting, and residual diagnostics.

plot_ts()
Plot a Time Series
plot_ts_acf()
ACF and PACF Plots
plot_ts_pacf()
PACF Plot (convenience alias)
plot_ts_stl()
Plot STL Decomposition Components
plot_ts_forecast()
Plot Historical Series + Forecast with Confidence Bands
plot_ts_garch()
GARCH Volatility Plot
plot_ts_sarima_garch()
Dual-Axis Plot for SARIMA-GARCH: Mean + Conditional Volatility
plot_ts_residuals()
Residual Diagnostic Plots

Utilities

Helper functions for predictions, data I/O, and other tasks.

combine_preds()
Combine Multiple Prediction Results
read_nbs()
Read and Combine National Bureau of Statistics XLS Files

On this page
